caption: The video depicts a group of medical professionals gathered in a hospital setting, likely during a simulation week as indicated by the text "Sim Week" on the screen. The scene is labeled "Day 5," suggesting this is part of a multi-day event. The participants are seated in a semi-circle, with one individual in pink scrubs and a headscarf appearing to lead the discussion. They are holding papers and seem engaged in a serious conversation, possibly reviewing patient cases or discussing medical procedures. The environment includes hospital beds and medical equipment, reinforcing the clinical context. The participants are dressed in various types of medical attire, indicating a diverse team of healthcare workers collaborating and learning together.
